title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMAddressPoint
description: A standalone address point from OpenStreetMap, representing a node or area tagged with addr:* keys that describes a postal address not attached to a specific building outline. Used when address data exists independently of building geometry.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMAddressPoint

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element.

streetAddress.description: Property. Name of the street to which the address belongs. OSM tag: addr:street. Model:'https://schema.org/streetAddress'

houseNumber.description: Property. House or building number within the street. Includes suffixes such as '14A' or '14-16'. OSM tag: addr:housenumber. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:addr'

houseName.description: Property. Named identifier of the building or property, as an alternative or complement to a house number. OSM tag: addr:housename. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:addr'

addressCity.description: Property. Name of the city or town. OSM tag: addr:city. Model:'https://schema.org/addressLocality'

addressDistrict.description: Property. Name of the district, sub-municipality, or borough within the city. OSM tag: addr:district. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:addr'

addressProvince.description: Property. Name of the province, region, or state. OSM tag: addr:province. Model:'https://schema.org/addressRegion'

postalCode.description: Property. Postal or ZIP code for the address. OSM tag: addr:postcode. Model:'https://schema.org/postalCode'

addressCountry.description: Property. Two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. 'ES', 'FR', 'DE'). OSM tag: addr:country. Model:'https://schema.org/addressCountry'

fullAddress.description: Property. Full address in a single text string for cases where individual fields are not available. OSM tag: addr:full. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:addr'

refBuilding.description: Relationship. URI reference to an associated OSMBuilding entity, when this address point corresponds to a known building.

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources about this item.
